us-adaptation-english-prep2go-app.question: What is an apostille?
us-adaptation-english-prep2go-app.answer: An official certification making a document valid for use in another country (for countries in the Hague Convention) Foreign documents (birth certificates / diplomas) may need apostille for US use. US documents need apostille for use abroad

us-adaptation-english-prep2go-app.question: What is accreditation in US higher education?
us-adaptation-english-prep2go-app.answer: Official recognition that a school or program meets quality standards — affects transfer credits and employer recognition Regional accreditation = highest standard. Employer accepted. National = often trade schools / less transferable

us-adaptation-english-prep2go-app.question: What is a public defender?
us-adaptation-english-prep2go-app.answer: A government-appointed lawyer provided free of charge to criminal defendants who cannot afford private counsel Constitutional right. Must prove financial inability to pay. Quality varies significantly by jurisdiction

uae-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Golden Visa?
uae-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Long-term UAE residence visa (5 or 10 years) for investors / entrepreneurs / skilled professionals and students 10-year renewable visa. No sponsor needed. Can stay outside UAE longer without losing residency Categories: AED 2M+ property / AED 2M+ investment / outstanding talent / PhD holders / top students.

uae-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is DIFC Courts?
uae-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: An independent English-language common law court within the Dubai International Financial Centre Separate from UAE civil law courts. Uses English common law. International arbitration hub For international contracts: specify DIFC jurisdiction for dispute resolution — much more internationally recognised.

uae-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is RTA Dubai?
uae-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Roads and Transport Authority — manages ALL of Dubai's transport: roads / metro / buses / water taxis / taxis Essential for daily life. RTA app = one-stop for: transport / parking / vehicle registration / NOL RTA is one of the best transport authorities in the world. Genuinely excellent app and service.

saudi-arabia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Iqama?
saudi-arabia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: The essential residency permit for all expatriates in Saudi Arabia — without it you cannot legally work / open a bank account or access most services Iqama grants access to: banking / healthcare / driving licence / SIM card / school enrollment and rental contracts Must be carried at all times. Renew at least 3 days bef

saudi-arabia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Ramadan in Saudi Arabia?
saudi-arabia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: The holy month of fasting — more strictly observed than UAE. All public eating/drinking/smoking banned during daylight Working hours reduced to 6 hours/day during Ramadan. Government pace slows significantly Ramadan evenings vibrant — Iftar / Tarawih prayers / late-night socialising. Business picks up after Iftar.

saudi-arabia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is NEOM?
saudi-arabia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: A $500 billion mega-project in northwest Saudi Arabia — the world's most ambitious city-building project Includes: The Line (170km linear city) / Sindalah (luxury yacht island) / Trojena (mountain ski resort) Major employer of international talent now. Long-term vision — expect 10–20 year development horizon.

singapore-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Singapore Public Holidays?
singapore-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: 11 public holidays: New Year / Chinese New Year (2 days) / Good Friday / Labour Day / Vesak / Hari Raya Puasa / National Day / Hari Raya Haji / Deepavali / Christmas Multi-cultural holidays reflecting Singapore's diversity. Chinese New Year = biggest holiday Chinese New Year = 2-day PH but businesses often close 4–7 da

singapore-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Singapore's healthcare system?
singapore-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: World-class public and private healthcare — ranked among best globally. Subsidised public system for PR/citizens. Expats typically use private healthcare or international insurance. Public A&W wards very good but expensive without subsidy Singapore public hospitals excellent but expats pay full rates without PR/citizen

singapore-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Internationalisation of workforce?
singapore-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Singapore actively managing foreigner:local ratio — Fair Consideration Framework / Complementarity Assessment Framework (COMPASS) COMPASS points-based system for EP applications assessing: salary / qualifications / diversity / support for locals Higher-scoring candidates get EP more easily. Understand COMPASS before yo

south-africa-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is South Africa's provinces?
south-africa-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: 9 provinces: Gauteng / Western Cape / KwaZulu-Natal / Eastern Cape / Limpopo / Mpumalanga / North West / Free State / Northern Cape Gauteng (Johannesburg / Pretoria) = economic hub. Western Cape (Cape Town) = lifestyle capital. KZN (Durban) = coastal / Indian culture Each province has distinct culture / climate and cos

south-africa-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Cape Town?
south-africa-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: South Africa's legislative capital and most popular expat destination — on the slopes of Table Mountain at the tip of Africa World-class beaches / wine farms / restaurants / outdoor lifestyle. Atlantic Seaboard / City Bowl / Southern Suburbs / Winelands Cape Town = best quality of life in Africa. 'Cape Town privilege'

south-africa-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Hermanus / Garden Route?
south-africa-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Spectacular coastal region east of Cape Town — whale watching / pristine beaches / lagoons / forests Garden Route: Knysna / Plettenberg Bay / George / Wilderness. World's best whale watching in Hermanus (July–November) Many remote-working expats relocate to Garden Route for lifestyle. Good internet / lower cost than Ca

australia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is The six states and two territories?
australia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: States: New South Wales (Sydney) / Victoria (Melbourne) / Queensland (Brisbane) / South Australia (Adelaide) / Western Australia (Perth) / Tasmania (Hobart). Territories: ACT (Canberra) / Northern Territory (Darwin). State governments manage: schools / hospitals / roads / police. Federal government: immigration / tax /

australia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Sydney (NSW)?
australia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Australia's largest city — 5.3M people. International gateway / financial centre / iconic harbour / beaches. Most expensive Australian city. CBD / North Shore / Inner West / Eastern Suburbs / Northern Beaches / Western Sydney Opera House / Harbour Bridge / Bondi Beach = icons. But real Sydney life = local beaches / caf

australia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Melbourne (VIC)?
australia-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Australia's second city — 5.1M people. Cultural capital / café culture / sports obsession / laneways. Most liveable city in Australia for many. Strong arts / food / sport scene. Tram network unique in Australia AFL (Australian Rules Football) is Melbourne's religion. Attend a game at the MCG = essential cultural experi

canada-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Cost of living Canada?
canada-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Expensive — especially Toronto and Vancouver. Housing is the dominant crisis. Toronto 1BR apartment: CAD 2,200–3,500/month. Vancouver: CAD 2,300–3,800/month. Calgary: CAD 1,600–2,400/month. Ottawa: CAD 1,800–2,600/month Groceries / utilities / alcohol all notably more expensive than USA. Eating out: CAD 20–45/meal. Cof

canada-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Toronto (Ontario)?
canada-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Canada's largest city — 6.4M metro. Financial / tech / media and cultural capital. Most expensive Canadian housing market. Diverse: 140+ languages spoken. Pearson International = Canada's busiest airport Neighbourhoods: Yorkville (upscale) / Kensington Market (bohemian) / Scarborough / Etobicoke (affordable) / Distille

canada-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Montreal (Quebec)?
canada-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Canada's French-speaking metropolis — 4.2M metro. Culture / arts / food / universities / affordable. Must speak French for full integration. Bilingual environment in practice. McGill / Concordia = English universities Most affordable major Canadian city. Vibrant arts scene / excellent food / distinct Quebecois culture.

germany-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Cost of living Germany?
germany-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Moderate to high — Munich and Frankfurt most expensive. Berlin rising fast. East Germany significantly cheaper. Munich 1BR: €1,500–2,800/month. Berlin 1BR: €1,200–2,200/month. Leipzig 1BR: €700–1,200/month. Frankfurt: €1,400–2,600/month West Germany significantly more expensive than East. Stuttgart / Hamburg / Munich =

germany-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Berlin?
germany-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Germany's capital and largest city — 3.7M people. Startup hub / arts / nightlife / tech / government. Most international city in Germany. Largest English-speaking expat community. Fastest growing tech ecosystem in Europe Relatively affordable vs other European capitals but rising fast. Excellent public transport. Very

germany-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Munich (München)?
germany-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Bavaria's capital — 1.5M people. Highest quality of life / best salaries / BMW / Siemens / MAN headquarters. Most expensive German city. Oktoberfest globally famous. Alps 1 hour away. Very safe. Excellent quality of life Average gross salary in Munich: €58,000 (highest in Germany). But rent is highest too. Net benefit

japan-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Japan's safety?
japan-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Japan consistently ranked world's safest country — violent crime near zero / lost items returned / streets safe at all hours. Petty crime almost non-existent. Leave phone on table at café — it will be there when you return Safety is Japan's great gift to expats. Children travel alone from age 6–7. Reality as remarkable

japan-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Tokyo?
japan-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Japan's capital and world's largest metropolitan area — 37M in Greater Tokyo. 23 Special Wards + surrounding cities. Most expensive Japanese city. Best jobs / infrastructure / international community. Everything is here Tokyo is actually many cities. Shinjuku / Shibuya / Akihabara / Ginza / Shimokitazawa all feel compl

japan-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Osaka?
japan-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Japan's second city and commercial heart — 2.8M city / 19M metro. Food capital of Japan. More relaxed than Tokyo. Kansai region: Osaka / Kyoto / Kobe / Nara all within 1 hour. Strong startup scene. Lower cost than Tokyo Osaka people = most outgoing Japanese. Known for food obsession ('kuidaore' = eat until you drop cul

netherlands-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Dutch public holidays?
netherlands-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: New Year (Jan 1) / Good Friday / Easter (2 days) / Koningsdag (April 27) / Liberation Day (May 5) / Ascension / Whit Monday / Christmas (Dec 25-26). Koningsdag (King's Day / April 27) = biggest national street party. Amsterdam transforms into orange-clad open-air market Liberation Day (May 5) = solemn morning (remembra

netherlands-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Amsterdam?
netherlands-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Netherlands' capital and financial/tech hub — 920K city / 2.5M metro. Canals / museums / international community. Most expensive Dutch city. Schiphol Airport 20 min. Strong tech / startup / creative economy. ING / ABN AMRO / ASML nearby Housing crisis = severe. Most expats: Amstelveen / Hoofddorp / Haarlem / Zaandam an

netherlands-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Rotterdam?
netherlands-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Netherlands' port city — 660K people. Europe's largest port. Architecture capital. More affordable than Amsterdam. Brutalist / modernist architecture after WWII bombing. Erasmus Bridge iconic. Lower rents. Growing cultural scene Best affordable alternative to Amsterdam. 40 min by Intercity train. Much better for famili

uk-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Cost of living UK?
uk-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Very high — London among world's most expensive cities. Regional variation enormous. London 1BR: £1,800–3,500/month. Manchester: £1,000–1,800. Edinburgh: £1,100–2,000. Birmingham: £900–1,600 Outside London: dramatically lower costs. Manchester / Birmingham / Leeds / Glasgow = excellent quality of life at 60% of London

uk-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is London?
uk-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: UK capital — 9M city / 14M metro. Global finance / tech / creative / law. Most expensive UK city by far. Tube / Overground / Elizabeth Line / buses = world-class transport. Tech: Silicon Roundabout (Shoreditch). Finance: City + Canary Wharf Zone 1-2 rents astronomical. Many professionals live: Zone 3-4 (30-40 min commu

uk-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Bristol?
uk-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: South-west England — 470K. Aerospace / tech / creative / universities / sustainability. Airbus UK / high-tech manufacturing. Young professional hub. Strong cycling culture. Very popular with families Bristol = most liveable UK city outside London in multiple surveys. Clifton / Bedminster / Stokes Croft popular with exp

portugal-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Cost of living Portugal?
portugal-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Among the most affordable Western European countries — especially outside Lisbon and Porto Lisbon 1BR apartment centre: €1,200–1,800/month. Porto: €900–1,400/month. Algarve: €900–1,500/month. Interior: €400–700/month Food / transport / healthcare dramatically cheaper than UK / Germany / Netherlands. Wine at supermarket

portugal-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Alentejo?
portugal-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Portugal's vast southern interior — cork forests / rolling plains / medieval villages / excellent wine and food Évora (UNESCO) / Comporta (luxury beach) / Monsaraz / Marvão. Slowest pace of life in Portugal Alentejo wines and olive oil world-class. Extremely affordable living. Popular with remote workers seeking peace.

portugal-survival-guide-prep2go-app.question: What is Madeira?
portugal-survival-guide-prep2go-app.answer: Portuguese Atlantic archipelago — 300 miles off the African coast. Year-round mild climate / dramatic volcanic landscapes. No seasonal temperature extremes. Funchal = capital city. Expat hub. Excellent fibre internet / low cost Cristiano Ronaldo's birthplace. Zero crime. Flowers / levada hiking / black sand beaches. Ve

us-citizenship-test-prep2go-app.question: What are two ways that Americans can participate in their democracy?
us-citizenship-test-prep2go-app.answer: Vote / join a political party / help with a campaign / join a civic group / join a community group / give an elected official your opinion / call your senators and representatives / publicly support or oppose an issue / run for office / write to a newspaper Many ways to participate beyond just voting.

us-citizenship-test-prep2go-app.question: What are two things the Bill of Rights protects?
us-citizenship-test-prep2go-app.answer: Freedom of speech / freedom of religion / right to bear arms / protection from unreasonable search and seizure / right to a fair trial / right to remain silent (pick two) First 10 amendments. Most important: 1st (speech/religion/press) / 4th (search) / 5th (silence) / 6th (trial).

us-citizenship-test-prep2go-app.question: There were 13 original states. Name three.
us-citizenship-test-prep2go-app.answer: Connecticut / Delaware / Georgia / Maryland / Massachusetts / New Hampshire / New Jersey / New York / North Carolina / Pennsylvania / Rhode Island / South Carolina / Virginia (pick three) The 13 colonies became the 13 original states. Delaware = first to ratify Constitution.

life-in-the-uk-prep2go-app.question: What are the fundamental principles of British life?
life-in-the-uk-prep2go-app.answer: Democracy / the rule of law / individual liberty / tolerance of those with different faiths and beliefs / participation in community life These are the values everyone in the UK is expected to respect. Asked frequently — learn all five.

life-in-the-uk-prep2go-app.question: What is the Union Jack?
life-in-the-uk-prep2go-app.answer: The national flag of the United Kingdom combining the crosses of St George / St Andrew and St Patrick Red cross of St George (England) + white diagonal cross of St Andrew (Scotland) + red diagonal cross of St Patrick (Ireland).

life-in-the-uk-prep2go-app.question: What was the Domesday Book?
life-in-the-uk-prep2go-app.answer: A survey of England ordered by William the Conqueror in 1086 to record who owned land and what taxes were owed First detailed survey of England. Still exists. Used to assess taxes. Named 'Domesday' as there was no appeal.

naturalisation-francaise-prep2go-app.question: Quelles sont les 13 régions métropolitaines de France?
naturalisation-francaise-prep2go-app.answer: Île-de-France / Normandie / Bretagne / Pays de la Loire / Centre-Val de Loire / Hauts-de-France / Grand Est / Bourgogne-Franche-Comté / Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes / Nouvelle-Aquitaine / Occitanie / Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur / Corse Réforme 2016 : 22 régions → 13. Plus 5 régions d'outre-mer.

naturalisation-francaise-prep2go-app.question: Qu'est-ce que le programme du Conseil national de la Résistance (CNR) de 1944?
naturalisation-francaise-prep2go-app.answer: Un programme politique qui posa les bases de l'État-providence français (Sécurité sociale / nationalisations / droits des travailleurs) 'Les Jours heureux'. Sécurité sociale / retraites / nationalisation des grandes entreprises. Mise en œuvre 1945–1946.

naturalisation-francaise-prep2go-app.question: Qu'est-ce que la Révocation de l'Édit de Nantes (1685)?
naturalisation-francaise-prep2go-app.answer: La décision de Louis XIV de supprimer la liberté de culte protestant / provoquant l'exil de 200 000 protestants (Huguenots) Édit de Nantes 1598 (Henri IV) = tolérance religieuse. Révocation 1685 = persécution des protestants. Contraire de la laïcité.

canadian-citizenship-prep2go-app.question: What is the right to minority language education?
canadian-citizenship-prep2go-app.answer: Citizens whose first language is the minority official language (English in Quebec / French elsewhere) have the right to educate their children in that language Section 23 of Charter. Protects francophone minorities outside Quebec and anglophone minority in Quebec.

canadian-citizenship-prep2go-app.question: What was the significance of the War of 1812?
canadian-citizenship-prep2go-app.answer: A conflict between the United States and Britain (including Canadian forces) / Canadians helped repel American invasion Burning of York (Toronto). Battle of Queenston Heights. Laura Secord warned British of American attack. Helped forge Canadian identity.

canadian-citizenship-prep2go-app.question: What were residential schools?
canadian-citizenship-prep2go-app.answer: Government-funded church-run schools that forced Indigenous children to assimilate / separating them from their families and culture Operated 1870s–1996. Abuse was widespread. Truth and Reconciliation Commission (2015) called it cultural genocide.

australian-citizenship-prep2go-app.question: Who was Gough Whitlam?
australian-citizenship-prep2go-app.answer: Labor Prime Minister 1972–1975 who introduced major reforms including Medicare / free university education and ending the White Australia Policy 'It's time' election campaign. Dismissed by Governor-General Kerr in 1975. Transformative but controversial PM.

australian-citizenship-prep2go-app.question: What pledge do new citizens make?
australian-citizenship-prep2go-app.answer: A pledge of commitment to Australia and its people / values and laws 'From this time forward, I pledge my loyalty to Australia and its people, whose democratic beliefs I share, whose rights and liberties I respect, and whose laws I will uphold and obey.'

australian-citizenship-prep2go-app.question: What is the significance of the Wave Hill Walk-Off (1966)?
australian-citizenship-prep2go-app.answer: Aboriginal stockmen at Wave Hill station led by Vincent Lingiari walked off in protest against unequal pay and poor conditions Led to equal wages for Aboriginal workers and eventually return of land. Gough Whitlam poured sand into Lingiari's hands.

leben-in-deutschland-prep2go-app.question: In Deutschland dürfen Menschen offen etwas gegen die Regierung sagen, weil …
Wie heißt die deutsche Verfassung?
leben-in-deutschland-prep2go-app.answer: Grundgesetz — das Basic Law, das seit 1949 als deutsche Verfassung gilt.

leben-in-deutschland-prep2go-app.question: Wahlen in Deutschland sind frei. Was bedeutet das?
leben-in-deutschland-prep2go-app.answer: Der Wähler darf weder beeinflusst noch gezwungen werden und keine Nachteile durch die Wahl haben.
